deployment.author: Rui Tracanas
deployment.message:
fix: check raw 'upn' and 'preferred_username' claims for v2 token auth
Microsoft.Identity.Web disables inbound claim mapping by default, so JWT v2 token claims are stored under their raw names ('upn', not the long-form ClaimTypes.Upn). The UPN check was always failing, causing 403 for all users including authorized ones.
